verses.text_hebrew: לֹא־יִקַּ֥ח אִ֖ישׁ אֶת־אֵ֣שֶׁת אָבִ֑יו וְלֹ֥א יְגַלֶּ֖ה כְּנַ֥ף אָבִֽיו׃ {ס}
verses.text_kjv: He that is wounded in the stones, or hath his privy member cut off, shall not enter into the congregation of the LORD.
verses.rendering: He that is wounded in the stones, or has his privy member cut off, shall not enter into the congregation of the LORD.
translator_notes: Deuteronomy narrative/law detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: לֹֽא־יָבֹ֧א פְצֽוּעַ־דַּכָּ֛א*(בספרי ספרד ורוב ספרי אשכנז דַּכָּ֛ה) וּכְר֥וּת שׇׁפְכָ֖ה בִּקְהַ֥ל יְהֹוָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.text_kjv: A bastard shall not enter into the congregation of the LORD; even to his tenth generation shall he not enter into the congregation of the LORD.
verses.rendering: A bastard shall not enter into the congregation of the LORD; even to his tenth generation shall he not enter into the congregation of the LORD.
translator_notes: Deuteronomy narrative/law detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: לֹא־יָבֹ֥א מַמְזֵ֖ר בִּקְהַ֣ל יְהֹוָ֑ה גַּ֚ם דּ֣וֹר עֲשִׂירִ֔י לֹא־יָ֥בֹא ל֖וֹ בִּקְהַ֥ל יְהֹוָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.text_kjv: An Ammonite or Moabite shall not enter into the congregation of the LORD; even to their tenth generation shall they not enter into the congregation of the LORD for ever:
verses.rendering: An Ammonite or Moabite shall not enter into the congregation of the LORD; even to their tenth generation shall they not enter into the congregation of the LORD for ever:
translator_notes: Deuteronomy narrative/law detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: לֹֽא־יָבֹ֧א עַמּוֹנִ֛י וּמוֹאָבִ֖י בִּקְהַ֣ל יְהֹוָ֑ה גַּ֚ם דּ֣וֹר עֲשִׂירִ֔י לֹא־יָבֹ֥א לָהֶ֛ם בִּקְהַ֥ל יְהֹוָ֖ה עַד־עוֹלָֽם׃
verses.text_kjv: Because they met you not with bread and with water in the way, when ye came forth out of Egypt; and because they hired against thee Balaam the son of Beor of Pethor of Mesopotamia, to curse thee.
verses.rendering: Because they met you not with bread and with water in the way, when you came forth out of Egypt; and because they hired against you Balaam the son of Beor of Pethor of Mesopotamia, to curse you.
translator_notes: Deuteronomy narrative/law detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: עַל־דְּבַ֞ר אֲשֶׁ֨ר לֹא־קִדְּמ֤וּ אֶתְכֶם֙ בַּלֶּ֣חֶם וּבַמַּ֔יִם בַּדֶּ֖רֶךְ בְּצֵאתְכֶ֣ם מִמִּצְרָ֑יִם וַאֲשֶׁר֩ שָׂכַ֨ר עָלֶ֜יךָ אֶת־בִּלְעָ֣ם בֶּן־בְּע֗וֹר מִפְּת֛וֹר אֲרַ֥ם נַהֲרַ֖יִם לְקַֽלְלֶֽךָּ׃
verses.text_kjv: Nevertheless the LORD thy God would not hearken unto Balaam; but the LORD thy God turned the curse into a blessing unto thee, because the LORD thy God loved thee.
verses.rendering: Nevertheless the LORD your God would not hearken to Balaam; but the LORD your God turned the curse into a blessing to you, because the LORD your God loved you.
translator_notes: Deuteronomy narrative/law detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וְלֹֽא־אָבָ֞ה יְהֹוָ֤ה אֱלֹהֶ֙יךָ֙ לִשְׁמֹ֣עַ אֶל־בִּלְעָ֔ם וַיַּהֲפֹךְ֩ יְהֹוָ֨ה אֱלֹהֶ֧יךָ לְּךָ֛ אֶת־הַקְּלָלָ֖ה לִבְרָכָ֑ה כִּ֥י אֲהֵֽבְךָ֖ יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֶֽיךָ׃
verses.text_kjv: Thou shalt not seek their peace nor their prosperity all thy days for ever.
verses.rendering: Thou shall not seek their peace nor their prosperity all your days for ever.
translator_notes: Deuteronomy narrative/law detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: לֹא־תִדְרֹ֥שׁ שְׁלֹמָ֖ם וְטֹבָתָ֑ם כׇּל־יָמֶ֖יךָ לְעוֹלָֽם׃ {ס}
verses.text_kjv: Thou shalt not abhor an Edomite; for he is thy brother: thou shalt not abhor an Egyptian; because thou wast a stranger in his land.
verses.rendering: Thou shall not abhor an Edomite; for he is your brother: you shall not abhor an Egyptian; because you wast a stranger in his land.
translator_notes: Deuteronomy narrative/law detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: לֹֽא־תְתַעֵ֣ב אֲדֹמִ֔י כִּ֥י אָחִ֖יךָ ה֑וּא לֹא־תְתַעֵ֣ב מִצְרִ֔י כִּי־גֵ֖ר הָיִ֥יתָ בְאַרְצֽוֹ׃
verses.text_kjv: The children that are begotten of them shall enter into the congregation of the LORD in their third generation.
verses.rendering: The children that are begotten of them shall enter into the congregation of the LORD in their third generation.
translator_notes: Deuteronomy narrative/law detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: בָּנִ֛ים אֲשֶׁר־יִוָּלְד֥וּ לָהֶ֖ם דּ֣וֹר שְׁלִישִׁ֑י יָבֹ֥א לָהֶ֖ם בִּקְהַ֥ל יְהֹוָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.text_kjv: When the host goeth forth against thine enemies, then keep thee from every wicked thing.
verses.rendering: When the host goeth forth against thine enemies, then keep you from every wicked thing.
translator_notes: Deuteronomy narrative/law detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: כִּֽי־תֵצֵ֥א מַחֲנֶ֖ה עַל־אֹיְבֶ֑יךָ וְנִ֨שְׁמַרְתָּ֔ מִכֹּ֖ל דָּבָ֥ר רָֽע׃
verses.text_kjv: If there be among you any man, that is not clean by reason of uncleanness that chanceth him by night, then shall he go abroad out of the camp, he shall not come within the camp:
verses.rendering: If there be among you any man, that is not clean by reason of uncleanness that chanceth him by night, then shall he go abroad out of the camp, he shall not come within the camp:
translator_notes: Deuteronomy narrative/law detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: כִּֽי־יִהְיֶ֤ה בְךָ֙ אִ֔ישׁ אֲשֶׁ֛ר לֹא־יִהְיֶ֥ה טָה֖וֹר מִקְּרֵה־לָ֑יְלָה וְיָצָא֙ אֶל־מִח֣וּץ לַֽמַּחֲנֶ֔ה לֹ֥א יָבֹ֖א אֶל־תּ֥וֹךְ הַֽמַּחֲנֶֽה׃
verses.text_kjv: But it shall be, when evening cometh on, he shall wash himself with water: and when the sun is down, he shall come into the camp again.
verses.rendering: But it shall be, when evening cometh on, he shall wash himself with water: and when the sun is down, he shall come into the camp again.
translator_notes: Deuteronomy narrative/law detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וְהָיָ֥ה לִפְנֽוֹת־עֶ֖רֶב יִרְחַ֣ץ בַּמָּ֑יִם וּכְבֹ֣א הַשֶּׁ֔מֶשׁ יָבֹ֖א אֶל־תּ֥וֹךְ הַֽמַּחֲנֶֽה׃
verses.text_kjv: Thou shalt have a place also without the camp, whither thou shalt go forth abroad:
verses.rendering: Thou shall have a place also without the camp, whither you shall go forth abroad:
translator_notes: Deuteronomy narrative/law detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וְיָד֙ תִּהְיֶ֣ה לְךָ֔ מִח֖וּץ לַֽמַּחֲנֶ֑ה וְיָצָ֥אתָ שָּׁ֖מָּה חֽוּץ׃
verses.text_kjv: And thou shalt have a paddle upon thy weapon; and it shall be, when thou wilt ease thyself abroad, thou shalt dig therewith, and shalt turn back and cover that which cometh from thee:
verses.rendering: you shall have a paddle upon your weapon; and it shall be, when you wilt ease thyself abroad, you shall dig therewith, and shall turn back and cover that which cometh from you:
translator_notes: Deuteronomy narrative/law detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וְיָתֵ֛ד תִּהְיֶ֥ה לְךָ֖ עַל־אֲזֵנֶ֑ךָ וְהָיָה֙ בְּשִׁבְתְּךָ֣ ח֔וּץ וְחָפַרְתָּ֣ה בָ֔הּ וְשַׁבְתָּ֖ וְכִסִּ֥יתָ אֶת־צֵאָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.text_kjv: For the LORD thy God walketh in the midst of thy camp, to deliver thee, and to give up thine enemies before thee; therefore shall thy camp be holy: that he see no unclean thing in thee, and turn away from thee.
verses.rendering: For the LORD your God walketh in the midst of your camp, to deliver you, and to give up thine enemies before you; therefore shall your camp be holy: that he see no unclean thing in you, and turn away from you.
translator_notes: Deuteronomy narrative/law detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: כִּי֩ יְהֹוָ֨ה אֱלֹהֶ֜יךָ מִתְהַלֵּ֣ךְ ׀ בְּקֶ֣רֶב מַחֲנֶ֗ךָ לְהַצִּֽילְךָ֙ וְלָתֵ֤ת אֹיְבֶ֙יךָ֙ לְפָנֶ֔יךָ וְהָיָ֥ה מַחֲנֶ֖יךָ קָד֑וֹשׁ וְלֹֽא־יִרְאֶ֤ה בְךָ֙ עֶרְוַ֣ת דָּבָ֔ר וְשָׁ֖ב מֵאַחֲרֶֽיךָ׃ {ס}
verses.text_kjv: Thou shalt not deliver unto his master the servant which is escaped from his master unto thee:
verses.rendering: Thou shall not deliver to his master the servant which is escaped from his master to you:
translator_notes: Deuteronomy narrative/law detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: לֹא־תַסְגִּ֥יר עֶ֖בֶד אֶל־אֲדֹנָ֑יו אֲשֶׁר־יִנָּצֵ֥ל אֵלֶ֖יךָ מֵעִ֥ם אֲדֹנָֽיו׃
verses.text_kjv: He shall dwell with thee, even among you, in that place which he shall choose in one of thy gates, where it liketh him best: thou shalt not oppress him.
verses.rendering: He shall dwell with you, even among you, in that place which he shall choose in one of your gates, where it liketh him best: you shall not oppress him.
translator_notes: Deuteronomy narrative/law detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: עִמְּךָ֞ יֵשֵׁ֣ב בְּקִרְבְּךָ֗ בַּמָּק֧וֹם אֲשֶׁר־יִבְחַ֛ר בְּאַחַ֥ד שְׁעָרֶ֖יךָ בַּטּ֣וֹב ל֑וֹ לֹ֖א תּוֹנֶֽנּוּ׃ {ס}
verses.text_kjv: There shall be no whore of the daughters of Israel, nor a sodomite of the sons of Israel.
verses.rendering: There shall be no whore of the daughters of Israel, nor a sodomite of the sons of Israel.
translator_notes: Deuteronomy narrative/law detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: לֹא־תִהְיֶ֥ה קְדֵשָׁ֖ה מִבְּנ֣וֹת יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וְלֹֽא־יִהְיֶ֥ה קָדֵ֖שׁ מִבְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.text_kjv: Thou shalt not bring the hire of a whore, or the price of a dog, into the house of the LORD thy God for any vow: for even both these are abomination unto the LORD thy God.
verses.rendering: Thou shall not bring the hire of a whore, or the price of a dog, into the house of the LORD your God for any vow: for even both these are abomination to the LORD your God.
translator_notes: Deuteronomy narrative/law detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: לֹא־תָבִיא֩ אֶתְנַ֨ן זוֹנָ֜ה וּמְחִ֣יר כֶּ֗לֶב בֵּ֛ית יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֶ֖יךָ לְכׇל־נֶ֑דֶר כִּ֧י תוֹעֲבַ֛ת יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהֶ֖יךָ גַּם־שְׁנֵיהֶֽם׃ {ס}
verses.text_kjv: Thou shalt not lend upon usury to thy brother; usury of money, usury of victuals, usury of any thing that is lent upon usury:
verses.rendering: Thou shall not lend upon usury to your brother; usury of money, usury of victuals, usury of any thing that is lent upon usury:
translator_notes: Deuteronomy narrative/law detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: לֹא־תַשִּׁ֣יךְ לְאָחִ֔יךָ נֶ֥שֶׁךְ כֶּ֖סֶף נֶ֣שֶׁךְ אֹ֑כֶל נֶ֕שֶׁךְ כׇּל־דָּבָ֖ר אֲשֶׁ֥ר יִשָּֽׁךְ׃
verses.text_kjv: Unto a stranger thou mayest lend upon usury; but unto thy brother thou shalt not lend upon usury: that the LORD thy God may bless thee in all that thou settest thine hand to in the land whither thou goest to possess it.
verses.rendering: Unto a stranger you mayest lend upon usury; but to your brother you shall not lend upon usury: that the LORD your God may bless you in all that you settest thine hand to in the land whither you goest to possess it.
translator_notes: Deuteronomy narrative/law detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: לַנׇּכְרִ֣י תַשִּׁ֔יךְ וּלְאָחִ֖יךָ לֹ֣א תַשִּׁ֑יךְ לְמַ֨עַן יְבָרֶכְךָ֜ יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֶ֗יךָ בְּכֹל֙ מִשְׁלַ֣ח יָדֶ֔ךָ עַל־הָאָ֕רֶץ אֲשֶׁר־אַתָּ֥ה בָא־שָׁ֖מָּה לְרִשְׁתָּֽהּ׃ {ס}
verses.text_kjv: When thou shalt vow a vow unto the LORD thy God, thou shalt not slack to pay it: for the LORD thy God will surely require it of thee; and it would be sin in thee.
verses.rendering: When you shall vow a vow to the LORD your God, you shall not slack to pay it: for the LORD your God will surely require it of you; and it would be sin in you.
translator_notes: Deuteronomy narrative/law detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: כִּֽי־תִדֹּ֥ר נֶ֙דֶר֙ לַיהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֶ֔יךָ לֹ֥א תְאַחֵ֖ר לְשַׁלְּמ֑וֹ כִּֽי־דָרֹ֨שׁ יִדְרְשֶׁ֜נּוּ יְהֹוָ֤ה אֱלֹהֶ֙יךָ֙ מֵֽעִמָּ֔ךְ וְהָיָ֥ה בְךָ֖ חֵֽטְא׃
verses.text_kjv: But if thou shalt forbear to vow, it shall be no sin in thee.
verses.rendering: But if you shall forbear to vow, it shall be no sin in you.
translator_notes: Deuteronomy narrative/law detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: וְכִ֥י תֶחְדַּ֖ל לִנְדֹּ֑ר לֹֽא־יִהְיֶ֥ה בְךָ֖ חֵֽטְא׃
verses.text_kjv: That which is gone out of thy lips thou shalt keep and perform; even a freewill offering, according as thou hast vowed unto the LORD thy God, which thou hast promised with thy mouth.
verses.rendering: That which is gone out of your lips you shall keep and perform; even a freewill offering, according as you hast vowed to the LORD your God, which you hast promised with your mouth.
translator_notes: Deuteronomy narrative/law detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: מוֹצָ֥א שְׂפָתֶ֖יךָ תִּשְׁמֹ֣ר וְעָשִׂ֑יתָ כַּאֲשֶׁ֨ר נָדַ֜רְתָּ לַיהֹוָ֤ה אֱלֹהֶ֙יךָ֙ נְדָבָ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר דִּבַּ֖רְתָּ בְּפִֽיךָ׃ {ס}
verses.text_kjv: When thou comest into thy neighbour’s vineyard, then thou mayest eat grapes thy fill at thine own pleasure; but thou shalt not put any in thy vessel.
verses.rendering: When you comest into your neighbour’s vineyard, then you mayest eat grapes your fill at thine own pleasure; but you shall not put any in your vessel.
translator_notes: Deuteronomy narrative/law detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: כִּ֤י תָבֹא֙ בְּכֶ֣רֶם רֵעֶ֔ךָ וְאָכַלְתָּ֧ עֲנָבִ֛ים כְּנַפְשְׁךָ֖ שׇׂבְעֶ֑ךָ וְאֶֽל־כֶּלְיְךָ֖ לֹ֥א תִתֵּֽן׃ {ס}
verses.text_kjv: When thou comest into the standing corn of thy neighbour, then thou mayest pluck the ears with thine hand; but thou shalt not move a sickle unto thy neighbour’s standing corn.
verses.rendering: When you comest into the standing corn of your neighbour, then you mayest pluck the ears with thine hand; but you shall not move a sickle to your neighbour’s standing corn.
translator_notes: Deuteronomy narrative/law detail. Full verse-specific note to be completed in quality pass.

verses.text_hebrew: כִּ֤י תָבֹא֙ בְּקָמַ֣ת רֵעֶ֔ךָ וְקָטַפְתָּ֥ מְלִילֹ֖ת בְּיָדֶ֑ךָ וְחֶרְמֵשׁ֙ לֹ֣א תָנִ֔יף עַ֖ל קָמַ֥ת רֵעֶֽךָ׃ {ס}
